PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?wrestler ?wrestlerLabel ?championships WHERE {
  ?wrestler wdt:P106 wd:Q2727289 ; wdt:P9100 ?championships ; rdfs:label ?wrestlerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?wrestlerLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?championships) > 7)
}
ORDER BY DESC(xsd:integer(?championships))
